"C:\Program Files\CMake\bin\cmake.exe" -E rm -f CMakeFiles\lemmings.out.dir/objects.a
C:\msys64\clang64\bin\llvm-ar.exe qc CMakeFiles\lemmings.out.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\lemmings.out.dir\objects1.rsp
C:\msys64\clang64\bin\clang++.exe -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\lemmings.out.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive -o lemmings.out.exe -Wl,--out-implib,liblemmings.out.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles\lemmings.out.dir\linkLibs.rsp
